reviews.review_title: Sucks can’t even get it installed
reviews.review_description: What a mess can’t even install it after paying for the subscription what a joke this really sucks.

developer_response.body:
Hello! On behalf of the entire team, we would like to sincerely apologize for the poor experience you had during the installation; this is certainly not the standard we aim for.
We would appreciate just one opportunity to resolve this setup issue so that you can properly experience the app. Please send us an email at support@visualscale.xyz and we will put our full effort into turning your experience around.
That being said, thank you for your feedback; it helps us identify exactly where we need to focus our efforts to improve.

Best regards,

The Visual Scale Team

reviews.review_description:
Currently have it paired with chatgpt in a browser window in the quest universal menu while using voice mode and all of our project documents uploaded to the chat, phone being used as a wifi Hotspot for my quest 3 - this will be an absolute force to be reckoned with. Measurement tool appears to be accurate to a 1/2" so don't plan on doing framing while in pass through mode but as an electrical contractor this is going to revolutionize the layout game for receptacles. Would love to see the ability to load vertical plane pdfs such as interior elevations as well. We do commercial construction and the potential is so immense I can't say anything but wow. Just wow. Love it! Would love to see things like a marker tool for dropping icons with voice dictated notes that can be hovered over to read. Hand controls are where it's at for this app so avoid using your controllers.

Amazing job! Can't wait to see how this is developed further!

developer_response.body:
We sincerely appreciate your feedback and are pleased to know that you see the same potential in the platform as we do. Your insights are extremely valuable, and we’re happy to share that we are already working on enhancements, including support for vertical plan projections. We were particularly impressed by your integration of ChatGPT and voice mode. If you're open to it, we’d love to learn more about your implementation.
Warm regards,
The Visual Scale Team

reviews.review_description: I cannot get the start screen to take my 6 diget pin. There is no way for me to click ok. I put in a support ticket but have not received any direction

developer_response.body:
Hello,
We're sorry to hear you're experiencing trouble with the security token.

After entering the six-digit code, please make sure to close the dial display by clicking the OK button. In the background window, the OK button should then turn white—indicating it's active. At that point, and while using hand tracking, you should be able to click it.

Please let us know if this resolves the issue, or if you need further assistance.

Best regards,
The Visual Scale Support Team

reviews.review_description: As developers of the App, we believe it’s definitely a 4-star for us, maybe not 5, because we know there’s always room for improvement! We’d love to hear your feedback too!
It is very useful to see the plan printed on the floor. It’s much easier to understand the sizes this way than by looking at it on a laptop.

A truly great app — incredibly useful for everyday life in architectural projects!
If I had this when I was designing my own house, I definitely would have used it.

reviews.review_title: A whole new way to see real scale space!
reviews.review_description:
Visual Scale is a really cool and useful app! It allowed me to view floor plans at real scale like never before, which was incredibly helpful and gave me a whole new perspective. The experience feels smooth, the visuals are clean, and it’s super easy to use.

I’d love to see future updates with even more features or ways to interact with the spaces. It’s a unique tool that shows how powerful VR can be for visualizing environments. Definitely worth trying!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your words—they are so appreciated! We will keep these updates in mind, hopefully soon.
